title: How do I view and resolve holds and blocks on Student Hub?
plain_text: A block or a hold is an administrative gap in a student's account that prevents the student from performing certain actions. The type of hold may affect a student's ability to obtain information or perform enrollment-related activities such as registering for courses, obtaining grades or transcripts, or applying for graduation. A student must address all blocks and holds. Table of contents View blocks and holds Soft blocks Hard blocks Resolve blocks and holds View blocks and holds Soft blocks 1. Log in to Student Hub. 2. Select Notifications. A red notification badge indicates the number of blocks, holds, and action items that require your attention. They are listed by their due date, and you can select individual notifications to view additional details. Hard blocks In the case of hard blocks, you will receive a pop-up notification about the block. Please navigate to the block and solve it. You will be able to access the Student Hub only after you've resolved the hard block. Resolve blocks and holds 1. Select 'Banner Self-Service' to be directed to the Northeastern Registrar's website, which details the hold types, dates, reasons, and processes affected by that hold. 2. Select a block to be redirected to the Student Info Dashboard, where the block can be resolved.
body_html:
A block or a hold is an administrative gap in a student's account that prevents the student from performing certain actions. The type of hold may affect a student's ability to obtain information or perform enrollment-related activities such as registering for courses, obtaining grades or transcripts, or applying for graduation. A student must address all blocks and holds.

Table of contents

  • View blocks and holds
    • Soft blocks
    • Hard blocks
  • Resolve blocks and holds

View blocks and holds

Soft blocks

  • Log in to Student Hub.
  • Select Notifications.
  • A red notification badge indicates the number of blocks, holds, and action items that require your attention.

Hard blocks

In the case of hard blocks, you will receive a pop-up notification about the block. Please navigate to the block and solve it. You will be able to access the Student Hub only after you've resolved the hard block.

Resolve blocks and holds

  • Select 'Banner Self-Service' to be directed to the Northeastern Registrar's website, which details the hold types, dates, reasons, and processes affected by that hold.
  • Select a block to be redirected to the Student Info Dashboard, where the block can be resolved.

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: A block or a hold is an administrative gap in a student's account that prevents the student from performing certain actions. The type of hold may affect a student's ability to obtain information or perform enrollment-related activities such as registering for courses, obtaining grades or transcripts, or applying for graduation. A student must address all blocks and holds.

You will be able to access the Student Hub only after you've resolved the hard block.

steps: Select 'Banner Self-Service' to be directed to the Northeastern Registrar's website.
Select a block to be redirected to the Student Info Dashboard.
